main.h(3) Library Functions Manual main.h(3)

NAME

main.h

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct acds_config_t
Discovery server configuration.

Functions


int acds_main (void)
ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point.

Function Documentation

int acds_main (void )

ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point. Expects options already parsed and shared initialization complete. Called by main.c mode dispatcher after options_init() and asciichat_shared_init().

Returns

Exit code (0 = success, non-zero = error)

Definition at line 84 of file discovery-service/main.c.

84                     {
85   asciichat_error_t result;
86 
87   // Handle keepawake: check for mutual exclusivity and apply mode default
88   // Discovery-service default: keepawake DISABLED (use --keepawake to enable)
89   if (GET_OPTION(enable_keepawake) && GET_OPTION(disable_keepawake)) {
90     log_error("--keepawake and --no-keepawake are mutually exclusive");
91     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
92   }
93   if (GET_OPTION(enable_keepawake)) {
94     (void)platform_enable_keepawake();
95   }
96 
97   // Increase file descriptor limit for many concurrent connections
98 #ifdef __linux__
99   struct rlimit rl = {.rlim_cur = 65536, .rlim_max = 65536};
100   if (setrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE, &rl) < 0) {
101     log_warn("couldn't raise fd limit: %s", strerror(errno));
102   }
103 #elif defined(__APPLE__)
104   struct rlimit rl = {.rlim_cur = 10240, .rlim_max = RLIM_INFINITY};
105   setrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE, &rl);
106 #endif
107 
108   // Options already parsed and shared initialization complete (done by main.c)
109   const options_t *opts = options_get();
110 
111   log_info("ascii-chat Discovery Service (acds) starting...");
112   log_info("Version: %s (%s, %s)", ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE);
113 
114   // Initialize session string generator (libsodium)
115   result = acds_string_init();
116   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
117     log_error("Failed to initialize session string generator");
118     return result;
119   }
120 
121   // Load or generate identity keys
122   uint8_t public_key[32];
123   uint8_t secret_key[64];
124 
125   const char *acds_key_path = GET_OPTION(encrypt_key);
126   // If no key provided, use default path in config directory
127   char default_key_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH] = {0};
128   if (!acds_key_path || acds_key_path[0] == '\0') {
129     const char *config_dir = get_config_dir();
130     if (config_dir) {
131       safe_snprintf(default_key_path, sizeof(default_key_path), "%sdiscovery_identity", config_dir);
132       acds_key_path = default_key_path;
133     }
134   }
135   log_info("Loading identity key from %s", acds_key_path);
136   result = acds_identity_load(acds_key_path, public_key, secret_key);
137 
138   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
139     log_info("Identity key not found, generating new key...");
140 
141     result = acds_identity_generate(public_key, secret_key);
142     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
143       log_error("Failed to generate identity key");
144       return result;
145     }
146 
147     result = acds_identity_save(acds_key_path, public_key, secret_key);
148     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
149       log_error("Failed to save identity key to %s", acds_key_path);
150       return result;
151     }
152 
153     log_info("Saved new identity key to %s", acds_key_path);
154   }
155 
156   // Display server fingerprint
157   char fingerprint[65];
158   acds_identity_fingerprint(public_key, fingerprint);
159   log_info("Discovery server identity: SHA256:%s", fingerprint);
160   char msg[256];
161   safe_snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "🔑 Server fingerprint: SHA256:%s", fingerprint);
162   log_console(LOG_INFO, msg);
163 
164   // Create config from options for server initialization
165   acds_config_t config;
166   // Read validated port option (discovery-service listens on 'port', not 'acds_port')
167   int port_num = GET_OPTION(port);
168   if (port_num < 1 || port_num > 65535) {
169     log_error("Invalid port: %d (must be 1-65535)", port_num);
170     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
171   }
172   config.port = port_num;
173 
174   const char *address = opts && opts->address[0] != '\0' ? opts->address : "127.0.0.1";
175   const char *address6 = opts && opts->address6[0] != '\0' ? opts->address6 : "::1";
176   const char *log_file = opts && opts->log_file[0] != '\0' ? opts->log_file : "acds.log";
177   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.address, address, sizeof(config.address));
178   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.address6, address6, sizeof(config.address6));
179   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.database_path, GET_OPTION(discovery_database_path), sizeof(config.database_path));
180   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.key_path, acds_key_path, sizeof(config.key_path));
181   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.log_file, log_file, sizeof(config.log_file));
182   config.log_level = GET_OPTION(log_level);
183   config.require_server_identity = GET_OPTION(require_server_identity) != 0;
184   config.require_client_identity = GET_OPTION(require_client_identity) != 0;
185 
186   // Log security policy
187   if (config.require_server_identity) {
188     log_info("Security: Requiring signed identity from servers creating sessions");
189   }
190   if (config.require_client_identity) {
191     log_info("Security: Requiring signed identity from clients joining sessions");
192   }
193 
194   // Parse STUN servers from comma-separated list
195   config.stun_count = 0;
196   memset(config.stun_servers, 0, sizeof(config.stun_servers));
197   const char *stun_servers_str = GET_OPTION(stun_servers);
198   if (stun_servers_str && stun_servers_str[0] != '\0') {
199     char stun_copy[OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE];
200     SAFE_STRNCPY(stun_copy, stun_servers_str, sizeof(stun_copy));
201 
202     char *saveptr = NULL;
203     char *token = platform_strtok_r(stun_copy, ",", &saveptr);
204     while (token && config.stun_count < 4) {
205       // Trim whitespace
206       while (*token == ' ' || *token == '\t')
207         token++;
208       size_t len = strlen(token);
209       while (len > 0 && (token[len - 1] == ' ' || token[len - 1] == '\t')) {
210         token[--len] = '\0';
211       }
212 
213       if (len > 0 && len < sizeof(config.stun_servers[0].host)) {
214         config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host_len = (uint8_t)len;
215         SAFE_STRNCPY(config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host, token,
216                      sizeof(config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host));
217         log_info("Added STUN server: %s", token);
218         config.stun_count++;
219       } else if (len > 0) {
220         log_warn("STUN server URL too long (max 63 chars): %s", token);
221       }
222 
223       token = platform_strtok_r(NULL, ",", &saveptr);
224     }
225   }
226 
227   // Parse TURN servers from comma-separated list
228   config.turn_count = 0;
229   memset(config.turn_servers, 0, sizeof(config.turn_servers));
230   const char *turn_servers_str = GET_OPTION(turn_servers);
231   const char *turn_username_str = GET_OPTION(turn_username);
232   const char *turn_credential_str = GET_OPTION(turn_credential);
233 
234   if (turn_servers_str && turn_servers_str[0] != '\0') {
235     char turn_copy[OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE];
236     SAFE_STRNCPY(turn_copy, turn_servers_str, sizeof(turn_copy));
237 
238     char *saveptr = NULL;
239     char *token = platform_strtok_r(turn_copy, ",", &saveptr);
240     while (token && config.turn_count < 4) {
241       // Trim whitespace
242       while (*token == ' ' || *token == '\t')
243         token++;
244       size_t len = strlen(token);
245       while (len > 0 && (token[len - 1] == ' ' || token[len - 1] == '\t')) {
246         token[--len] = '\0';
247       }
248 
249       if (len > 0 && len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].url)) {
250         config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url_len = (uint8_t)len;
251         SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url, token,
252                      sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url));
253 
254         // Set username if provided
255         if (turn_username_str && turn_username_str[0] != '\0') {
256           size_t username_len = strlen(turn_username_str);
257           if (username_len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].username)) {
258             config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username_len = (uint8_t)username_len;
259             SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username, turn_username_str,
260                          sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username));
261           }
262         }
263 
264         // Set credential if provided
265         if (turn_credential_str && turn_credential_str[0] != '\0') {
266           size_t credential_len = strlen(turn_credential_str);
267           if (credential_len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].credential)) {
268             config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential_len = (uint8_t)credential_len;
269             SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential, turn_credential_str,
270                          sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential));
271           }
272         }
273 
274         log_info("Added TURN server: %s (username: %s)", token,
275                  turn_username_str && turn_username_str[0] ? turn_username_str : "<none>");
276         config.turn_count++;
277       } else if (len > 0) {
278         log_warn("TURN server URL too long (max 63 chars): %s", token);
279       }
280 
281       token = platform_strtok_r(NULL, ",", &saveptr);
282     }
283   }
284 
285   // Copy TURN secret for dynamic credential generation
286   const char *turn_secret_str = GET_OPTION(turn_secret);
287   if (turn_secret_str && turn_secret_str[0] != '\0') {
288     SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_secret, turn_secret_str, sizeof(config.turn_secret));
289     log_info("TURN dynamic credential generation enabled");
290   } else {
291     config.turn_secret[0] = '\0';
292   }
293 
294   // Initialize server
295   acds_server_t server;
296   memset(&server, 0, sizeof(server));
297   g_server = &server;
298 
299   result = acds_server_init(&server, &config);
300   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
301     log_error("Server initialization failed");
302     g_server = NULL;
303     return result;
304   }
305 
306   // Initialize WebSocket server (for browser clients)
307   websocket_server_config_t ws_config = {
308       .port = GET_OPTION(websocket_port),
309       .client_handler = NULL, // TODO: Implement WebSocket client handler for discovery-service
310       .user_data = &server,
311   };
312 
313   memset(&g_websocket_server, 0, sizeof(g_websocket_server));
314   asciichat_error_t ws_init_result = websocket_server_init(&g_websocket_server, &ws_config);
315   if (ws_init_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
316     log_warn("Failed to initialize WebSocket server - browser clients will not be supported");
317   } else {
318     log_info("WebSocket server initialized on port %d", GET_OPTION(websocket_port));
319   }
320 
321   // Initialize status tracking variables
322   g_discovery_start_time = time(NULL);
323   g_last_status_update = g_discovery_start_time;
324 
325   // Check if shutdown was requested during initialization
326   if (acds_should_exit()) {
327     log_info("Shutdown signal received during initialization, skipping server startup");
328     return 0;
329   }
330 
331   // =========================================================================
332   // UPnP Port Mapping (Quick Win for Direct TCP)
333   // =========================================================================
334   // Try to open port via UPnP so direct TCP works for ~70% of home users.
335   // If this fails, clients fall back to WebRTC automatically - not fatal.
336   //
337   // Strategy:
338   //   1. UPnP (works on ~90% of home routers)
339   //   2. NAT-PMP fallback (Apple routers)
340   //   3. If both fail: use ACDS + WebRTC (reliable, but slightly higher latency)
341 
342   // Check again before expensive UPnP initialization (might timeout trying to reach router)
343   if (acds_should_exit()) {
344     log_info("Shutdown signal received before UPnP initialization");
345     result = ASCIICHAT_OK;
346     goto cleanup_resources;
347   }
348 
349   if (GET_OPTION(enable_upnp)) {
350     asciichat_error_t upnp_result = nat_upnp_open(config.port, "ascii-chat ACDS", &g_upnp_ctx);
351 
352     if (upnp_result == ASCIICHAT_OK && g_upnp_ctx) {
353       char public_addr[22];
354       if (nat_upnp_get_address(g_upnp_ctx, public_addr, sizeof(public_addr)) == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
355         char msg[256];
356         safe_snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "🌐 Public endpoint: %s (direct TCP)", public_addr);
357         log_console(LOG_INFO, msg);
358         log_info("UPnP: Port mapping successful, public endpoint: %s", public_addr);
359       }
360     } else {
361       log_info("UPnP: Port mapping unavailable or failed - will use WebRTC fallback");
362       log_console(LOG_INFO, "📡 Clients behind strict NATs will use WebRTC fallback");
363     }
364   } else {
365     log_debug("UPnP: Disabled (use --upnp to enable automatic port mapping)");
366   }
367 
368   // Check if shutdown was requested before initializing mDNS
369   if (acds_should_exit()) {
370     log_info("Shutdown signal received before mDNS initialization");
371     result = ASCIICHAT_OK;
372     goto cleanup_resources;
373   }
374 
375   // Initialize mDNS for LAN discovery of ACDS server
376   // This allows clients on the local network to discover the discovery service itself
377 
378   log_debug("Initializing mDNS for ACDS LAN service discovery...");
379   g_mdns_ctx = asciichat_mdns_init();
380   if (!g_mdns_ctx) {
381     LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Failed to initialize mDNS (non-fatal, LAN discovery disabled)");
382     log_warn("mDNS disabled for ACDS - LAN discovery of discovery service will not be available");
383   } else {
384     // Advertise ACDS service on the LAN
385     // Build hostname if available
386     char hostname[256] = {0};
387     gethostname(hostname, sizeof(hostname) - 1);
388 
389     asciichat_mdns_service_t service = {
390         .name = "ascii-chat-Discovery-Service",
391         .type = "_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp",
392         .host = hostname,
393         .port = config.port,
394         .txt_records = NULL,
395         .txt_count = 0,
396     };
397 
398     asciichat_error_t mdns_advertise_result = asciichat_mdns_advertise(g_mdns_ctx, &service);
399     if (mdns_advertise_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
400       LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Failed to advertise ACDS mDNS service");
401       log_warn("mDNS advertising failed for ACDS - LAN discovery disabled");
402       asciichat_mdns_destroy(g_mdns_ctx);
403       g_mdns_ctx = NULL;
404     } else {
405       log_console(LOG_INFO, "🌐 mDNS: ACDS advertised as '_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp.local' on LAN");
406       log_info("mDNS: ACDS advertised as '_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp.local' (port=%d)", config.port);
407     }
408   }
409 
410   // Install signal handlers for clean shutdown
411   signal(SIGINT, acds_handle_signal);
412   signal(SIGTERM, acds_handle_signal);
413 
414 
415   // Run server
416   result = acds_server_run(&server);
417   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
418     log_error("Server run failed");
419   }
420 
421 cleanup_resources:
422   // Cleanup
423   // Disable keepawake before exit
424   platform_disable_keepawake();
425 
426   log_info("Shutting down discovery server...");
427   acds_server_shutdown(&server);
428   g_server = NULL;
429 
430   // Destroy WebSocket server
431   websocket_server_destroy(&g_websocket_server);
432   log_debug("WebSocket server destroyed");
433 
434   // Clean up UPnP port mapping
435   if (g_upnp_ctx) {
436     nat_upnp_close(&g_upnp_ctx);
437     log_debug("UPnP port mapping closed");
438   }
439 
440   // Clean up mDNS context
441   if (g_mdns_ctx) {
442     asciichat_mdns_destroy(g_mdns_ctx);
443     g_mdns_ctx = NULL;
444     log_debug("mDNS context shut down");
445   }
446 
447   log_info("Discovery server stopped");
448   return result;
449 }




References acds_identity_fingerprint(),
    acds_identity_generate(), acds_identity_load(),
    acds_identity_save(), acds_server_init(),
    acds_server_run(), acds_server_shutdown(),
    acds_string_init(), acds_config_t::address,
    acds_config_t::address6, asciichat_mdns_advertise(),
    asciichat_mdns_destroy(), asciichat_mdns_init(),
    acds_config_t::database_path, get_config_dir(),
    acds_config_t::key_path, acds_config_t::log_file,
    acds_config_t::log_level, nat_upnp_close(),
    nat_upnp_get_address(), nat_upnp_open(), options_get(),
    platform_disable_keepawake(), platform_enable_keepawake(),
    PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH, acds_config_t::port,
    acds_config_t::require_client_identity,
    acds_config_t::require_server_identity, safe_snprintf(),
    acds_config_t::stun_count, acds_config_t::stun_servers,
    acds_config_t::turn_count, acds_config_t::turn_secret,
    acds_config_t::turn_servers, websocket_server_destroy(), and
    websocket_server_init().








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.0
    ascii-chat
